source: Ontario Economic Accounts (OEA) — Office of Economic Policy, Ontario Ministry of Finance, and Statistics Canada
attribution: Contains information licensed under the Open Government Licence – Ontario

glossary.current: Current (nominal) dollars: values at the prices of each year — not adjusted for inflation.
glossary.chained: Chained (2017) dollars: real, volume-based values expressed in 2017 prices — inflation removed, so changes reflect real growth.
glossary.saar: Seasonally adjusted at annual rates (SAAR): seasonal swings removed and the quarterly figure scaled to a yearly pace for comparability.

table15.label: Table 15 — Ontario Production by Industry (Quarterly)
table15.frequency: Quarterly · seasonally adjusted at annual rates
